_gsc_meta.description: Defines command-line invocation templates for editors and terminals on macOS.

terminals.iterm2: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to tell (create window with default profile) to tell current session to write text "cd \"%s\" && clear"'
terminals.iterm2-ws: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to tell (create window with default profile) to tell current session to write text "cd \"%s\" && bash --rcfile \"${GSC_MAPPED_WS_ROOT}/.gsc-init.sh\""'
terminals.terminal.app-ws: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd \"%s\" && bash --rcfile \"${GSC_MAPPED_WS_ROOT}/.gsc-init.sh\""'
